IPartyPool","name":"pool","type":"address"}],"name":"working","outputs":[{"internalType":"bool","name":"","type":"bool"}],"stateMutability":"view","type":"function"}],"devdoc":{"details":"**Not safe as a same-transaction price oracle.** Every getter on this interface      derives its result from `IPartyPool` view state (`balances`, `LMSR`, `denominators`,      `_protocolFeesOwed`) without read-only-reentrancy protection. An integrator that reads      these values from inside a token callback (ERC777, ERC677, custom hook) or any other      mid-transaction callback path will observe inconsistent values. Treat the prices and      quotes returned here as point-in-time, off-chain\u2013consumable data. For on-chain pricing,      derive a TWAP from `Swap` / `Mint` / `Burn` event logs or use an external manipulation-      resistant oracle. See `IPartyPool` for the full guidance and `doc/security/checklist.md`      \u00a7C.2.","kind":"dev","methods":{"burnAmounts(address,uint256)":{"params":{"lpTokenAmount":"The amount of LP tokens to burn"},"returns":{"withdrawAmounts":"Array of token amounts that will be received"}},"burnSwapAmounts(address,uint256,uint256)":{"params":{"lpAmount":"amount of LP tokens to burn","outputTokenIndex":"index of target asset to receive"}},"flashFee(address,address,uint256)":{"params":{"amount":"The amount of tokens lent."},"returns":{"fee":"The amount of `token` charged on top of the returned principal."}},"maxFlashLoan(address,address)":{"params":{"token":"The loan currency."},"returns":{"_0":"The amount of `token` that can be borrowed."}},"maxLpForBudget(address,uint256,uint256)":{"details":"Workflow: dApp calls maxLpForBudget(pool, idx, budget) via eth_call, then      passes the returned lpAmountOut and maxAmountIn (== budget) into pool.swapMint.","returns":{"amountInUsed":"  total uint input that will be transferred at that lpAmountOut","inFee":"         fee portion of amountInUsed","lpAmountOut":"   largest feasible LP amount; 0 if budget is too small to mint anything"}},"mintAmounts(address,uint256)":{"details":"Returns minimum token amounts (rounded up) to receive `lpTokenAmount` LP tokens      at current pool proportions. Returns zeros for the initial deposit (handled by      transferring tokens first, then calling `initialMint()`).","params":{"lpTokenAmount":"The desired amount of LP tokens"},"returns":{"depositAmounts":"Array of token amounts to deposit (rounded up)"}},"poolPrice(address,uint256)":{"details":"Balanced approximation: pool value \u2248 nAssets \u00d7 quoteBalance.      Per-LP value = nAssets \u00d7 quoteBalance / totalSupply / D[quote].","params":{"quoteTokenIndex":"index of the quote asset in which to denominate the LP price"},"returns":{"_0":"price Q64.64 value equal to quote per LP token unit"}},"price(address,uint256,uint256)":{"details":"Computed as `exp((q[output] \u2212 q[input]) / b) \u00d7 D[output] / D[input]` where      `b = \u03ba \u00b7 \u03a3q` and `D[k] = pool.denominators()[k]`.      Fee-free and infinitesimal \u2014 actual average rate for a finite swap will be worse.      On a balanced pool with equal denominators this returns exactly `1 << 128`.","params":{"inputTokenIndex":"index of the token being sold","outputTokenIndex":"index of the token being bought"},"returns":{"_0":"External price as Q128.128 uint256"}},"swapAmounts(address,uint256,uint256,uint256)":{"params":{"inputTokenIndex":"index of token being sold","maxAmountIn":"maximum gross input allowed (inclusive of fee)","outputTokenIndex":"index of token being bought","pool":"pool being quoted"},"returns":{"amountIn":" gross input to transfer (includes fee)","amountOut":"output amount user would receive","inFee":"    fee taken from input amount"}},"swapAmountsForExactOutput(address,uint256,uint256,uint256)":{"details":"Given desired output `amountOut`, returns the required input (kernel cost      + pair fee) without iteration. Reverts if `amountOut` exceeds capacity for      asset j or is otherwise infeasible.","params":{"amountOut":"desired output in uint token units","inputTokenIndex":"index of token being sold","outputTokenIndex":"index of token being bought"},"returns":{"amountIn":"       total uint input required (kernel input + fee)","inFee":"          fee portion of amountIn"}},"swapAmountsForExactPrice(address,uint256,uint256,uint256)":{"details":"Uses 64 iterations of bisection on the actual two-sided LMSR state. Caller workflow:        uint256 target = info.price(pool, i, j) * 995 / 1000; // 0.5% slippage floor        (uint256 maxIn, uint256 minOut,) = info.swapAmountsForExactPrice(pool, i, j, target);        pool.swap(payer, sel, recv, i, j, maxIn, minOut, deadline, false, \"\");","params":{"inputTokenIndex":"index of token being sold","minPrice":"Q128.128 denomination-adjusted floor on P_fwd.                         Must be strictly less than info.price(pool, i, j).","outputTokenIndex":"index of token being bought"},"returns":{"amountIn":" gross input (uint token units, fee-inclusive)","amountOut":"net output (uint token units); pass as `minAmountOut` to `swap()`","inFee":"    fee portion of amountIn"}},"swapMintAmounts(address,uint256,uint256)":{"params":{"inputTokenIndex":"index of the input token","lpAmountOut":"exact LP shares the caller wants minted"},"returns":{"amountInUsed":"  total uint input that will be transferred (kernel input + fee)","inFee":"         the LP/protocol fee component included in amountInUsed"}}},"title":"IPartyInfo \u2014 Read-only view helpers for PartyPool","version":1},"userdoc":{"kind":"user","methods":{"burnAmounts(address,uint256)":{"notice":"Calculate the proportional withdrawal amounts for a given LP token amount."},"burnSwapAmounts(address,uint256,uint256)":{"notice":"Calculate the amounts for a burn swap operation."},"flashFee(address,address,uint256)":{"notice":"The fee charged for a given flash loan amount."},"maxFlashLoan(address,address)":{"notice":"The maximum amount of currency available to be lent."},"maxLpForBudget(address,uint256,uint256)":{"notice":"Off-chain helper for budget-style callers: bisect to find the largest         lpAmountOut that can be minted within `maxAmountIn`. b:/ipfs/QmSLr6bHkPFWT7ntj34jmwfyskpwo97T9jZUrk5sz3sdtR"]},"src/IOwnable.sol":{"keccak256":"0xeb6c0af1df493d5a32425f25a6f6905ca84f08f6ed4afc549b893644831eca3e","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://41db5e9b4c3156edda16c2712defe76a2a8e74dd3c8dcc2f3cd55fb38951112b","dweb:/ipfs/QmXkTzBJkSZZM4QWFYFT4CzcoDhieSbGEktNg9hA2zqAzd"]},"src/IPartyInfo.sol":{"keccak256":"0x7cc61c54f7ea294bcda5a6137a74c2c865a335a00cbd8c3c482d10c02e2d346d","license":"UNLICENSED","urls":["bzz-raw://735c96444d211a300a3ebc4480d140fdac651b32091b30ffd4ad327e456d3606","dweb:/ipfs/QmQQGc3raMnFttm5DoTNBBcmbUkegbNkqjNSTRn9oUYApr"]},"src/IPartyPool.sol":{"keccak256":"0x82e8045ea4d06946bda4dac06d85c9efd83ccf4507cf842c1e7d94e1ea8a2270","license":"UNLICENSED","urls":["bzz-raw://63ccb78b8f1488635fa4e57571e3f1fed88cc6acc1c0b0494f0515cbc3b4cd7c","dweb:/ipfs/QmdTMFmRysF5U2mkjAGqP45dBGfAjw4BNmn2sPXDuj3GRV"]},"src/LMSRStabilized.sol":{"keccak256":"0x7d1b19eb01df1b244edbf4822772e1d7e1c1424dffb4ac993bd70d8d7336c46e","license":"UNLICENSED","urls":["bzz-raw://d15c622f937bea2d3bab98a75e6541b62b668040076441fc05394a4b93831ddf","dweb:/ipfs/QmdvwaVFwUxJaf5L2aXkFm1ALx8CKPxG5UyhfgPwNEQTq4"]},"src/NativeWrapper.sol":{"keccak256":"0x3c24a1271530ce97216e376105903115a938a44a2f3968747a708835d532d328","license":"UNLICENSED","urls":["bzz-raw://2abb6bd8905a21e13ccf344332210d3e9f6e18e6768acbe93eba30dca690d135","dweb:/ipfs/QmUibKxx3sgw3WxDNggkoo9chTP8E7HmHrkLhUBjRcc49D"]}},"version":1}

params.lpTokenAmount: The amount of LP tokens to burn

returns.withdrawAmounts: Array of token amounts that will be received

params.lpAmount: amount of LP tokens to burn
params.outputTokenIndex: index of target asset to receive

returns.fee: The amount of `token` charged on top of the returned principal.

returns._0: The amount of `token` that can be borrowed.

maxLpForBudget(address,uint256,uint256).details: Workflow: dApp calls maxLpForBudget(pool, idx, budget) via eth_call, then      passes the returned lpAmountOut and maxAmountIn (== budget) into pool.swapMint.

returns.amountInUsed: total uint input that will be transferred at that lpAmountOut
returns.lpAmountOut: largest feasible LP amount; 0 if budget is too small to mint anything

mintAmounts(address,uint256).details: Returns minimum token amounts (rounded up) to receive `lpTokenAmount` LP tokens      at current pool proportions. Returns zeros for the initial deposit (handled by      transferring tokens first, then calling `initialMint()`).

params.lpTokenAmount: The desired amount of LP tokens

returns.depositAmounts: Array of token amounts to deposit (rounded up)

poolPrice(address,uint256).details: Balanced approximation: pool value ≈ nAssets × quoteBalance.      Per-LP value = nAssets × quoteBalance / totalSupply / D[quote].

params.quoteTokenIndex: index of the quote asset in which to denominate the LP price

returns._0: price Q64.64 value equal to quote per LP token unit

price(address,uint256,uint256).details: Computed as `exp((q[output] − q[input]) / b) × D[output] / D[input]` where      `b = κ · Σq` and `D[k] = pool.denominators()[k]`.      Fee-free and infinitesimal — actual average rate for a finite swap will be worse.      On a balanced pool with equal denominators this returns exactly `1 << 128`.

params.inputTokenIndex: index of the token being sold
params.outputTokenIndex: index of the token being bought

params.maxAmountIn: maximum gross input allowed (inclusive of fee)

swapAmountsForExactOutput(address,uint25.details: Given desired output `amountOut`, returns the required input (kernel cost      + pair fee) without iteration. Reverts if `amountOut` exceeds capacity for      asset j or is otherwise infeasible.

params.amountOut: desired output in uint token units

returns.amountIn: total uint input required (kernel input + fee)

swapAmountsForExactPrice(address,uint256.details: Uses 64 iterations of bisection on the actual two-sided LMSR state. Returns      `(maxAmountIn, minAmountOut, fee)` — pass both directly to `pool.swap()`.      NOT intended to be called from on-chain operations.      Caller workflow:        uint256 target = info.price(pool, i, j) * 995 / 1000; // 0.5% slippage floor        (uint256 maxIn, uint256 minOut,) = info.swapAmountsForExactPrice(pool, i, j, target);        pool.swap(payer, sel, recv, i, j, maxIn, minOut, deadline, false, "");

params.minPrice: Q128.128 denomination-adjusted floor on P_fwd.                         Must be strictly less than info.price(pool, i, j).

returns.amountOut: net output (uint token units); pass as `minAmountOut` to `swap()`

params.lpAmountOut: exact LP shares the caller wants minted

returns.amountInUsed: total uint input that will be transferred (kernel input + fee)
returns.inFee: the LP/protocol fee component included in amountInUsed

burnAmounts(address,uint256).notice: Calculate the proportional withdrawal amounts for a given LP token amount.

burnSwapAmounts(address,uint256,uint256).notice: Calculate the amounts for a burn swap operation.

flashFee(address,address,uint256).notice: The fee charged for a given flash loan amount.

maxFlashLoan(address,address).notice: The maximum amount of currency available to be lent.

maxLpForBudget(address,uint256,uint256).notice: Off-chain helper for budget-style callers: bisect to find the largest         lpAmountOut that can be minted within `maxAmountIn`. View-only — not for         on-chain consumption.

mintAmounts(address,uint256).notice: Calculate the proportional deposit amounts required for a given LP token amount.

poolPrice(address,uint256).notice: Price of one LP token denominated in `quoteToken` as Q64.64.

price(address,uint256,uint256).notice: Infinitesimal marginal exchange rate for a swap input→output as Q128.128,         denomination-adjusted to external token units.

swapAmounts(address,uint256,uint256,uint.notice: Quote an exact-input swap. Mirrors the on-chain swap math; auto-detects whether         the pool uses the BalancedPair fast-path kernel (via the `balancedPairKernel()`         marker selector) and routes accordingly.

swapAmountsForExactOutput(address,uint25.notice: Closed-form exact-output swap quote (companion to `swapAmounts` exact-in).

swapAmountsForExactPrice(address,uint256.notice: Off-chain view helper: bisect to find the exact input amount that drives the forward         marginal price P_fwd(input→output) down to `minPrice` (denomination-adjusted).

swapMintAmounts(address,uint256,uint256).notice: Quote an exact-LP-out swap-mint: given a target lpAmountOut, return the         total input (kernel + fee) the pool will pull from the caller.

working(address).notice: Returns true iff the pool is not killed and has been initialized with liquidity.
